title: Ignacia Pack
description: The resource pack every player should use when playing on the Ignacia SMP.
body:
# Hello There
This texture pack includes many custom items for roleplay, decorations and additions to my [main pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kais-minecraft-tweaks). It's highly recommended for all players on the Ignacia SMP, so everyone sees the same unique item.
## Features
### Optional additions to [Kai's Minecraft Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kais-minecraft-tweaks)
Ranking this pack above the Minecraft Tweaks pack overwrites
- the dark iron textures, including all blocks, items and entitys
- birch leaves are pink, no matter the biome they're in
### Custom Items
This feature requires OptiFine or CIT for Fabric
Here's a short version of all items. The corresponding names or Custom Model Data can be found on my [discord](https://discord.gg/ejBJJSr).
- 8 custom axes
- 4 custom swords
- Ignacias Zepter
- All crowns
- All special items like medals
- Beer and wine
- Invisible armor
